{{CargoRelic
|name=Moai
|rank=Blue
|affct=FTH
|birthday=09-10
|source=Lottery Machine (0.36%), Novice Scrolls (5%), Soul Chest (2%), Wishing (10.6%)
|description=On Sep 10, 1774, the outside world found out about these statues on Easter Island for the first time.

Moai were discovered by Captain Cook. During a passionate cruise, he landed on this small island and saw the aborigines holding a sacrifice. Due to the language barrier, Captain Cook never got to know the purpose and meaning of the event. He wrote it down in his diary, "These barbarians sent a Pirate-like statue to the stone island and fixed it there. Then, they began to dance around it. This is really a strange ceremony."

[Basic Info]

Material: Stone. Height: 10 m. Weight: 90 tons.
|fame=32
|art=22
|fth=45
|civ=27
|tech=28
|ss1=Snail HP +100
|ss2=Snail HP +200
|ss3=Snail HP +300
|ss4=Snail HP +500
|ss7=Snail HP +500<br>Snail HP +500 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quarry skill I.png|50px]] Place in Quarry: Find Ancient Fossil by +5%
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Mutant Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Research Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Ironball Thrower Boost]]
[[Category:Gaiastapo Boost]]
